meta.description: Exonaut Program fixed knowledge base — injected as AI context.

program.name: Exonaut Program
program.summary:
1. Executive Summary

The Exonaut Program Platform is a full-stack web application that manages, gamifies, and celebrates the Exoasia Innovation Hub internship experience. It is the digital home of every Exonaut — from the moment they accept their offer through their entire post-program alumni journey.

The platform replaces spreadsheets, manual tracking, and fragmented group chats with a single, beautifully designed system that makes excellence visible, competition healthy, and culture contagious.

The platform serves three primary audiences:

Exonauts (Active Interns) — track their missions, points, badges, rank, and cohort standing in real time

Mission Leads & Admins — manage cohorts, assign missions, award badges, post announcements, and generate reports

Alumni (Exonaut Corps) — maintain lifelong access to their profile, badges, and alumni network

The system is built around three pillars that every Exonaut must fulfill:

Pillar 1 — Project: Quality and completion of track deliverables and missions

Pillar 2 — Client: Relationship management and satisfaction score from their assigned client

Pillar 3 — Recruitment: Successfully identifying and referring the next Exonaut

The platform must be production-ready, mobile-responsive, deployable as a web app (ideally React + Node.js or a modern full-stack framework), and designed in Exoasia's brand colors.

3. User Roles & Permissions
Role
Who
Access Level
Super Admin
Mack Comandante
Full platform access. Can do everything.
Admin
Program Directors, Exoasia Staff
Manage cohorts, missions, badges, users, reports. Cannot delete admins.
Mission Lead
Track mentors, senior staff
Manage their track's missions, grade submissions, award kudos, view their cohort's leaderboard.
Exonaut (Active)
Current batch interns
View own dashboard, submit missions, give kudos, view leaderboard, manage profile.
Exonaut Corps (Alumni)
Graduates
Read-only access to their own historic profile, badges, and alumni directory. Can participate in alumni events.
Guest / Recruiter
Prospective interns, partners
View public leaderboard and public Exonaut profiles (if enabled). Cannot log in.

Role assignment is done by Admin at account creation or when upgrading an Exonaut to Alumni status after Launch Day.

7. Points System

Points are the currency of the platform. Every meaningful action earns points. Points determine rank, tier, and badge eligibility.

7.1  Points Table
Action
Points
Notes
Mission submitted on time (Pillar 1)
+10 to +50
Varies by mission weight, set by Admin
Mission approved — Good
+10 bonus
Added on top of submission points
Mission approved — Excellent
+20 bonus
Added on top of submission points
Mission revised and resubmitted
+5
For showing commitment after feedback
Client touchpoint logged
+15
Per verified touchpoint
Client satisfaction score 4★
+20
Awarded by Mission Lead
Client satisfaction score 5★
+35
Awarded by Mission Lead
Client deliverable accepted
+25
Per accepted client deliverable
Recruit candidate submitted
+30
Name + contact info submitted
Recruit passes interview
+50
Candidate accepts offer
Recruit completes Batch 1 month
+25
Retention bonus — your recruit stays
Teach-Back session conducted
+15
Verified by Mission Lead
Attend Monday Ignition
+5
Per session (max 12)
Post Friday Win Wall
+5
Per week (max 12)
Post Mid-Week Pulse
+3
Per week (max 12)
Give peer kudos
+2
Per kudos given (max 3/week)
Receive peer kudos
+3
Per kudos received (uncapped)
Intern of the Week — winner
+25
Weekly award
Midpoint Fire Check — completed
+10
Flat attendance bonus
Pledge signed (Day 1)
+50
One-time onboarding bonus
LinkedIn post published
+20
Verified by screenshot or tag
Demo Day presentation delivered
+50
One-time, all Exonauts who present
Perfect Pillar — max Project score
+100
One-time, end of program
Perfect Pillar — max Client score
+100
One-time, end of program
Perfect Pillar — max Recruit score
+100
One-time, end of program

Points deductions are not used. Poor performance results in missed opportunities for bonus points — not penalties.

7.2  Pillar Weights

For Tier and special award calculations, pillar scores are weighted:

Pillar 1 — Project: 40% of total pillar score

Pillar 2 — Client: 35% of total pillar score

Pillar 3 — Recruitment: 25% of total pillar score

Raw total points (unweighted) determine the leaderboard rank. Weighted pillar scores determine tier upgrades and special badge eligibility.

8. Tier & Rank System

8.1  Tier Definitions
Tier
Points Required
Visual Identity
Exonaut (Entry)
0+
Lime #C9E500 border · White background icon
Exonaut Builder
100+
Bronze #CD7F32 border · Bronze icon
Exonaut Prime
300+
Silver #A8B4BE border · Silver icon
Exonaut Elite
600+
Gold #C9A000 border · Gold icon
Exonaut Apex
900+
Platinum #8BE8FF border · Platinum icon with glow
Exonaut Corps (Alumni)
Program completion
Lavender #B095C5 border · Permanent status

Tier upgrades are automatic and immediate once the point threshold is crossed. A notification is sent and a Tier Upgrade celebration animation plays on the Exonaut's dashboard.

Tier downgrades do not occur during a program. Once a tier is achieved it is kept for the remainder of the cohort.

8.2  Rank

Rank is the Exonaut's position on the cohort leaderboard, sorted by total raw points. Rank is real-time and updates every time points are added.

Rank is displayed as '#1 of 30' format

The change vs last week is shown as ↑3 (green) or ↓2 (red)

The top 3 ranks are displayed with gold/silver/bronze crown icons

All 30 positions are visible on the full leaderboard

9. Badge System

Badges are the most emotionally resonant part of the platform. They are digital certificates of achievement that live on every Exonaut's profile forever.

9.1  Badge Categories
Category
Description
Milestone Tiers (4)
Awarded when an Exonaut crosses a point threshold: Bronze Builder, Silver Strategist, Gold Innovator, Platinum Disruptor
Track Completion (7)
Awarded when the Exonaut completes all missions within their assigned track: AI Strategist, Venture Builder, L&D Champion, Experience Maker, AI Dev Builder, Policy Analyst, Content Creator
Pillar Badges (4)
Awarded for achieving maximum score on a pillar: Delivery Machine (Project), Innovation Catalyst (Project), Client Champion (Client), Talent Scout (Recruitment)
Special Awards (7)
Program-end awards: Perfect Trifecta, Track MVP, Intern of the Week, Most Likely to Disrupt, Culture Carrier, Full Cycle, Pipeline Builder

Total: 22 possible badges per cohort. Most Exonauts earn 4–10. An Exonaut who earns all 22 is an extremely rare achievement.

9.2  Badge Display Rules

Earned badges: Full color, with name, date, and description on hover/tap

Unearned badges: Greyed-out silhouette with 'Locked' label — visible to motivate

New badge earned: Full-screen celebration animation on first view (confetti + badge zoom-in)

Badge ID format: EXO-BADGE-[CATEGORY]-[CODE]-[BATCH] e.g. EXO-BADGE-MIL-GLD-2026

Downloadable certificate: Each badge links to a downloadable PDF certificate (pre-filled with Exonaut's name, date, cohort)

9.3  Badge Award Triggers

Milestone tier badges: Auto-awarded when point threshold is crossed (system-generated)

Track completion badge: Auto-awarded when all track missions are marked Approved by Mission Lead

Pillar badges: Manually awarded by Admin or Mission Lead on the badge management screen

Special awards: Manually awarded by Admin only — usually at Demo Day

Intern of the Week badge: Auto-awarded weekly based on leaderboard logic, confirmed by Admin

11. Mission Management

Missions are the tasks and deliverables that Exonauts complete during the program. They are the primary driver of Project pillar points.

11.1  Mission Data Model
Field
Description
Mission ID
Auto-generated: EXO-MSN-[TRACK]-[BATCH]-[NUM]
Title
Short mission name, max 80 characters
Description
Full brief, rich text, max 2000 characters
Track
One of 7 tracks (or 'All Tracks' for cohort-wide missions)
Assigned To
Individual Exonaut or all Exonauts in a track
Points Value
Base points for on-time submission (set by Admin)
Due Date
Hard deadline with time
Pillar
Project / Client / Recruitment
Deliverable Type
Document · Presentation · Video · Link · Tool/Code · Event Plan
Status
Not Started / In Progress / Submitted / Approved / Needs Revision / Overdue
Submission
File upload or URL link
Mission Lead Feedback
Rich text, visible to Exonaut after review
Grade
Needs Revision / Good / Excellent (not numeric)
Bonus Points Awarded
Set by Mission Lead at grading (0 / +10 / +20)

11.2  Mission Workflow

Admin or Mission Lead creates mission and assigns it

Exonaut receives notification (in-app + email)

Exonaut marks mission 'In Progress' (optional but tracked for engagement metrics)

Exonaut submits deliverable (file upload or URL) before deadline

Mission Lead reviews within 48 hours and grades it

If 'Needs Revision': Exonaut is notified with feedback. They can resubmit once.

If 'Good' or 'Excellent': Points are auto-awarded. Badge eligibility is rechecked.

Mission marked Approved. Visible on Exonaut profile history.

11.3  Mission Feed & Filters

Filter by: All / My Track / All Tracks

Filter by: Status / Due Date / Pillar

Sort by: Due Date (default) / Points Value / Status

Overdue missions are highlighted in red

'Assigned this week' section at top

12. Peer Kudos System

Kudos is the social recognition engine. It drives the 'lift before you climb' culture and powers the Culture Carrier badge.

Any Exonaut can give kudos to any other Exonaut in their cohort

Maximum 3 kudos given per Exonaut per week (resets Monday)

Kudos are public — posted to the cohort activity feed with the giver's name and message

Giver earns +2 points. Receiver earns +3 points.

Kudos history visible on recipient's profile

The Exonaut with the most kudos received in the cohort earns the Culture Carrier badge

KUDOS FORM

Select recipient from cohort list (dropdown with photos)

Write a kudos message (max 200 characters, required)

Optional: tag a pillar (Project / Client / Recruitment) that the kudos is for

Submit button ('Give Kudos') — Lime, prominent

13. Weekly Rituals Tracker

The rituals tracker is a lightweight attendance and participation system that keeps Exonauts accountable to the weekly cadence.

Ritual
How It's Tracked
Points
Monday Ignition
Admin marks attendance in-app after the session
+5
Mid-Week Pulse
Exonaut posts their Pulse in the platform (replaces group chat)
+3
Friday Win Wall
Exonaut posts their Win in the platform (replaces group chat)
+5
Intern of the Week
Auto-calculated from weekly points, Admin confirms
+25
Teach-Back Session
Mission Lead marks completion, uploads recording link
+15
Midpoint Fire Check
Admin marks completion after 1:1 meeting
+10
Demo Day
Admin marks all presenters at end of program
+50
Pledge Signing
Admin marks at Day 1 onboarding
+50 (one-time)

The Weekly Ritual Tracker on the dashboard shows the current week's completion status in real time. Past weeks are archived and visible in the Rituals History section of the profile.

14. Announcements & Notifications

14.1  Admin Announcements

Admins can post announcements visible to: All Exonauts / Specific Track / Single Exonaut

Announcements appear at the top of the dashboard feed with a 'New' badge

Announcement types: Info (blue) / Action Required (amber) / Celebration (lime) / Urgent (red)

Announcements include a rich text body and optional attachment/link

Exonauts can react to announcements (emoji reactions: 🔥 ⚡ 🚀 💡)

14.2  Notification System

IN-APP NOTIFICATIONS (BELL ICON IN SIDEBAR)

New mission assigned

Mission deadline in 48 hours

Mission graded (with result)

Kudos received (with message preview)

Rank change (up or down)

Tier upgrade achieved (with animation trigger)

Badge earned (with animation trigger)

Admin announcement posted

Intern of the Week — you won

EMAIL NOTIFICATIONS (USER CAN TOGGLE OFF IN SETTINGS)

New mission assigned

Mission deadline in 24 hours (reminder)

Weekly summary email (sent Sunday evening): points earned, rank, top 3 wins, next week's missions

Badge earned

Admin announcement (Action Required type only, always sent)

roles.exonaut: Active intern. Can view their own dashboard, submit missions, give kudos, view the leaderboard.
roles.lead: Mission Lead / Track Lead. Manages a track, grades submissions, awards kudos, views their cohort.
roles.commander: Mission Commander. Cohort-wide oversight, escalations, health checks, EOW awards.
roles.admin: Platform Admin. Full access — cohort management, user management, missions, badges, points, reports.
roles.alumni: Exonaut Corps. Read-only access to own profile, badges, mission history, alumni directory.

tracks.name: AI Strategy & Advisory
tracks.objective: Deliver a comprehensive AI Readiness Assessment and Strategic Roadmap for a real enterprise client, culminating in a signed advisory engagement and a board-ready presentation.
tracks.clientType: Philippine or ASEAN enterprise considering AI adoption

tracks.name: EBELI Venture Building
tracks.objective: Take a founder or startup client from a raw idea through the full EBELI methodology — from concept validation and TRL assessment to an investor-ready pitch deck and prototype plan.
tracks.clientType: Early-stage founder or startup seeking to build an AI-powered company

tracks.name: Learning & Development
tracks.objective: Design and deliver an AI literacy or upskilling program for a real organizational client, from needs assessment through a live workshop pilot and full curriculum package.
tracks.clientType: HR, L&D, or OD team at a corporation, government agency, or academic institution

tracks.name: Events & Experiences
tracks.objective: Design and deliver a real high-impact event or experiential activation for a client, from brief to run-of-show to live execution.
tracks.clientType: Brand, institution, or organization planning an event or launch

tracks.name: AI-Native Software
tracks.objective: Ship a working AI-powered software product for a real client — from spec through prototype to deployed, user-tested build.
tracks.clientType: SME, startup, or internal team needing an AI-native tool or workflow

tracks.name: Research, Policy & Insight
tracks.objective: Produce a rigorous research, policy, or industry-insight report for a real client — from brief through primary research to publication-ready document.
tracks.clientType: Think tank, government agency, industry body, or enterprise research function

tracks.name: Social Media Marketing
tracks.objective: Build and execute a full AI-powered social media strategy for a real client, including brand audit, content system, platform growth, and measurable results.
tracks.clientType: Brand, startup, or organization seeking to grow digital presence

pointsRubric.note: Set per track task by Track Lead

discoveryTiers.note: Strong week — most Exonauts target this
Top performers — unlocks Intern of the Week nomination

missions.task: Pledge Signing Ceremony — attend Day 1, sign the Pledge, post group photo.
Complete platform onboarding wizard — photo, bio, track, client.
Post LinkedIn announcement within 48 hours using the approved template.

Prospecting Mission — identify and qualify 10 prospects relevant to your track. For each, document: company, industry, size, key contact + LinkedIn, pain point, proposed service hook. Log all in the Game Changer Funnel CRM.
Attend Monday Ignition — post your Week 1 goal.
Post Friday Win Wall — your #1 win from Week 1.

10 Concept Papers — write a 1–2 page concept paper for EACH of your 10 prospects. Each must include: exec summary, problem statement, proposed solution, scope, timeline, expected outcomes, investment range. All 10 must be ML-approved before sending. (+30 per paper, up to +20 Excellent bonus each)
Send concept papers to all 10 prospects and request a Discovery Meeting with each.
Discovery Meetings — conduct structured 30–45 min discovery sessions. +25 per verified meeting. Outcome tiers scored on total meetings booked: 3 = GOOD (+75), 4–6 = GREAT (+150), 7+ = AWESOME (+250).
Client Sign-Off — any prospect that signs an engagement letter / MOU earns the Pipeline Bonus. Stack these — multiple signs, multiple bonuses.
Mid-Week Pulse — track your meeting count toward tier.
Friday Win Wall — share your tier hit (GOOD / GREAT / AWESOME).

AIS.title: AI Readiness Assessment — Phase 1
missions: Client Sign-Off — engagement letter / MOU signed (+50 Pipeline Bonus)

Mission 1 · AI Readiness Diagnostic — Exoasia AI Readiness Framework across 6 dimensions: Data Maturity, Process Automation, AI Awareness, Leadership Buy-In, Technical Infra, Budget Readiness (+30, +20 bonus)

AIS.title: Competitive & Landscape Analysis
missions: Mission 2 · Industry AI Landscape Report — 4–6 pages on AI adoption trends, use cases, competitive intel for client's industry. 5+ real case studies (+35, +20)
Log client touchpoint with preliminary findings (+15)

AIS.title: AI Use Case Prioritization
missions: Mission 3 · Use Case Identification & Prioritization Matrix — 6–10 AI use cases scored on Business Impact, Feasibility, Data Availability, ROI. 2×2 matrix with top 3 (+35, +20)
Teach-Back Session — teach cohort one framework from your AI strategy work (+15)

AIS.title: Midpoint Fire Check + Strategic Roadmap Draft
missions: Midpoint Fire Check — 30-min 1:1 with ML (+10)
Mission 4 · AI Strategic Roadmap Draft — 3-year transformation roadmap: vision, 3 priorities, 90-day wins, 12-month milestones, 3-year goals, resources, risks (+40, +20)

AIS.title: Client Roadmap Presentation Prep + Recruit
missions: Mission 5 · Client Roadmap Presentation — 10–15 slide board-ready PPT, client-branded (+40, +20)
Recruit Scout — submit 1 candidate for next cohort (+30)

AIS.title: Client Presentation Delivery
missions: Mission 6 · Present AI Strategic Roadmap to client — submit recording/notes, reactions, 1-page action memo (+40, +20 if next phase agreed)
Client Deliverable Accepted (+25)

AIS.title: Capstone Scoped — AI Business Case
missions: Mission 7 · AI Transformation Business Case — investment-grade: exec summary, problem, proposed solution, implementation plan, cost-benefit, risks, ROI projection (+50, +20)

AIS.title: Capstone Build + Recruit Follow-up
missions: Capstone build sessions — refine business case with ML feedback
Recruit follow-up (+15 per touchpoint)

AIS.title: Capstone Final + Peer Vote
missions: Finalize business case for Demo Day
Peer voting opens

AIS.title: Demo Day + Corps Induction
missions: Demo Day · 8-min presentation: discovery → roadmap → business case (+50)
Exonaut Corps induction
